CAT19-010.headline: Men and Grief
CAT19-010.subtitle: When culture denies permission to mourn
CAT19-010.figureLine: A single standing clay figure holds its own chest with both hands, shoulders pressed inward, posture quietly holding back a sorrow it has not been allowed to release.
CAT19-010.sceneLine: A soft blue-indigo accent veil drapes loosely over one shoulder of the figure, its folds gathered but never tightened, suggesting grief carried in private beneath an unspoken expectation.

CAT19-011.headline: Fatherhood And Mental Health
CAT19-011.subtitle: The emotional transition most men don't discuss
CAT19-011.figureLine: A single seated clay figure leans forward with hands clasped low, posture thoughtful and weighted, conveying a quiet inner shift carried alone.
CAT19-011.sceneLine: A small soft light blue-indigo rounded form rests cradled in the curve of the figure's lap, gentle and protected, suggesting tenderness held without words.

CAT19-013.headline: Men After Divorce
CAT19-013.subtitle: Mental health risks during separation
CAT19-013.figureLine: A single standing clay figure stands slightly off-balance with one hand reaching to steady itself, posture unmoored yet still upright, conveying a life suddenly redrawn.
CAT19-013.sceneLine: A pale blue-indigo line on the ground beside the figure splits cleanly into two diverging paths, the gap between them quiet and wide, suggesting a shared life pulled apart.

CAT19-014.headline: Custody Battles
CAT19-014.subtitle: The psychological toll on fathers
CAT19-014.figureLine: A single seated clay figure curls protectively around an empty space at its center, arms forming a careful circle, posture aching and guarded.
CAT19-014.sceneLine: A faint pale blue-indigo outline of a small absent shape glows softly within the circle of the figure's arms, present and missing at once, suggesting a bond strained by distance.

CAT19-030.headline: The Male Midlife Crisis
CAT19-030.subtitle: Separating myth from psychological reality
CAT19-030.figureLine: A single standing clay figure pauses mid-stride and turns its torso to look back, posture caught between where it has been and where it is going.
CAT19-030.sceneLine: A long soft light blue-indigo shadow stretches behind the figure while a faint blue-indigo accent glow opens ahead, suggesting a turning point reckoning with time.

CAT19-052.headline: Paternal Postpartum Depression
CAT19-052.subtitle: The role of fatherhood programs
CAT19-052.figureLine: A single seated clay figure sits low with head bowed and hands resting open on its knees, posture heavy yet quietly reachable.
CAT19-052.sceneLine: A gentle pale blue-indigo arc of light leans toward the figure from one side like an offered hand, soft and unhurried, suggesting support arriving in a hard season.

CAT19-059.headline: Grief Retreats For Men
CAT19-059.subtitle: Structured programs that honor male mourning
CAT19-059.figureLine: A small group of three clay figures sits together in a loose circle, postures relaxed and turned slightly toward one another, conveying shared sorrow held in company.
CAT19-059.sceneLine: A ring of soft light blue-indigo embers rests on the ground between the figures, warm and steady, suggesting mourning given space among others.

CAT20-001.headline: Chronic Illness Diagnosis
CAT20-001.subtitle: The emotional stages that follow
CAT20-001.figureLine: A single standing clay figure stands very still with arms loose at its sides, posture absorbing the weight of news it did not expect.
CAT20-001.sceneLine: A series of pale blue-indigo concentric ripples spreads slowly outward across the ground around the figure's feet, suggesting waves of feeling settling over time.

CAT20-002.headline: Illness And Identity
CAT20-002.subtitle: How chronic illness disrupts the sense of self
CAT20-002.figureLine: A single seated clay figure rests with one hand pressed gently to its own chest, posture searching inward, conveying a self being quietly redefined.
CAT20-002.sceneLine: A soft light blue-indigo reflection beside the figure shows a form that no longer quite matches its outline, blurred and shifting, suggesting an evolving sense of self.

CAT20-003.headline: Medical Gaslighting
CAT20-003.subtitle: When doctors dismiss physical symptoms
CAT20-003.figureLine: A single standing clay figure holds one hand outward as if speaking, the other resting on its own side, posture insistent yet unheard.
CAT20-003.sceneLine: A pale blue-indigo wave moves toward the figure and dissolves before reaching it, suggesting a voice that keeps going unacknowledged.

CAT20-004.headline: The Grief Of Chronic Illness
CAT20-004.subtitle: Mourning a lost future
CAT20-004.figureLine: A single seated clay figure gazes toward an open horizon with hands folded quietly in its lap, posture still and contemplative, conveying a future quietly grieved.
CAT20-004.sceneLine: A faded pale blue-indigo path drifts off into the distance and softens to almost nothing, suggesting a road once imagined now releasing its hold.

CAT20-005.headline: Invisible Illness
CAT20-005.subtitle: The mental toll of looking fine while suffering
CAT20-005.figureLine: A single standing clay figure stands upright and composed while one hand presses quietly against its own midsection, posture steady on the surface yet privately strained.
CAT20-005.sceneLine: A calm soft light blue-indigo glow surrounds the figure's outline while a deeper blue-indigo accent stirs faintly within it, suggesting a struggle held unseen beneath a steady exterior.

CAT20-007.headline: The Boom-And-Bust Cycle
CAT20-007.subtitle: Energy crashes in chronic illness and fatigue
CAT20-007.figureLine: A single clay figure is shown rising tall then sinking low in one continuous posture, captured between exertion and collapse, conveying a draining cycle.
CAT20-007.sceneLine: A soft light blue-indigo wave rises into a crest then falls steeply across the ground beside the figure, suggesting energy that surges and gives way.

CAT20-008.headline: Chronic Fatigue And Identity
CAT20-008.subtitle: Sense of self under lasting exhaustion
CAT20-008.figureLine: A single seated clay figure leans heavily against unseen support with limbs softened and slow, posture worn thin yet still present.
CAT20-008.sceneLine: A pale blue-indigo form beside the figure thins and fades at its edges like settling mist, suggesting a self worn down by lasting depletion.

CAT20-009.headline: Financial Toxicity Of Illness
CAT20-009.subtitle: When healthcare costs destroy wellbeing
CAT20-009.figureLine: A single standing clay figure stands beneath an unseen weight with shoulders bowed and knees slightly bent, posture bearing a burden beyond the illness itself.
CAT20-009.sceneLine: A column of pale blue-indigo blocks stacks precariously above the figure, leaning and uneven, suggesting an accumulating pressure pressing down on wellbeing.

CAT20-010.headline: Self-Advocacy In Medicine
CAT20-010.subtitle: How to advocate for yourself in medical settings
CAT20-010.figureLine: A single standing clay figure plants both feet firmly and lifts its chin, one hand open and forward, posture composed and quietly assertive.
CAT20-010.sceneLine: A clear blue-indigo accent line extends steadily outward from the figure's open hand, unbroken and direct, suggesting a voice carried with calm conviction.

CAT20-018.headline: Complex Regional Pain Syndrome
CAT20-018.subtitle: Understanding its neurological roots
CAT20-018.figureLine: A single seated clay figure cradles one limb carefully with both hands, posture attentive and protective, conveying close care for a sensitive part of the body.
CAT20-018.sceneLine: A network of fine soft light blue-indigo threads gathers and glows softly around the cradled limb, intricate and alive, suggesting signals firing far beyond their cause.

CAT20-023.headline: Support Through Cancer
CAT20-023.subtitle: Psychological care during diagnosis and treatment
CAT20-023.figureLine: A single seated clay figure rests with hands gently held by an unseen presence at its side, posture tired but not alone, conveying quiet companionship through a hard passage.
CAT20-023.sceneLine: A steady pale blue-indigo glow rests close beside the figure like a sheltering warmth, calm and constant, suggesting care that stays through difficulty.

CAT20-030.headline: Chronic Kidney Disease
CAT20-030.subtitle: Protecting psychological wellbeing
CAT20-030.figureLine: A single seated clay figure settles into a slow, patient stillness with hands resting open, posture adjusting to a steadier, gentler rhythm of living.
CAT20-030.sceneLine: A soft light blue-indigo current flows in a calm, unhurried loop beside the figure, suggesting a steady rhythm being carefully kept and tended.

CAT20-037.headline: Mental Health And Surgery
CAT20-037.subtitle: What to expect before and after
CAT20-037.figureLine: A single standing clay figure stands poised at the edge of a threshold with one foot lifted, posture steadying itself before a passage and a recovery.
CAT20-037.sceneLine: A pale blue-indigo archway of light frames the space ahead of the figure, soft on both sides, suggesting a crossing from before into after.

CAT20-041.headline: Facing A Terminal Diagnosis
CAT20-041.subtitle: Psychology of meaning at end of life
CAT20-041.figureLine: A single seated clay figure sits with open hands resting upturned in its lap and head lifted softly, posture peaceful and gathering meaning.
CAT20-041.sceneLine: A single warm pale blue-indigo point of light hovers gently before the figure in the surrounding dark, small and steady, suggesting meaning held close at a quiet ending.

CAT20-042.headline: Organ Transplantation
CAT20-042.subtitle: The emotional and psychological journey
CAT20-042.figureLine: A single standing clay figure presses one open hand softly over its chest, posture grateful and contemplative, conveying a profound gift quietly absorbed.
CAT20-042.sceneLine: A small soft light blue-indigo glow rests within the figure's chest while a faint blue-indigo accent thread connects outward, suggesting one life carried within another.

CAT20-043.headline: Pacing And Energy
CAT20-043.subtitle: Managing limits with chronic illness
CAT20-043.figureLine: A single standing clay figure takes one slow, measured step with weight carefully balanced, posture deliberate and unhurried, conveying energy spent with care.
CAT20-043.sceneLine: A row of evenly spaced soft light blue-indigo markers leads gently forward beside the figure, each modest and equal, suggesting effort portioned out steadily.

CAT20-047.headline: Returning To Work
CAT20-047.subtitle: The psychology of readjustment after serious illness
CAT20-047.figureLine: A single standing clay figure steps tentatively toward an open space with one hand still reaching back, posture cautiously returning to familiar ground.
CAT20-047.sceneLine: A pale blue-indigo path rejoins a wider clearing ahead of the figure, the seam softly lit, suggesting a careful return to a former rhythm.

CAT20-048.headline: Self-Compassion And Limits
CAT20-048.subtitle: Kindness when chronic illness narrows what is possible
CAT20-048.figureLine: A single seated clay figure wraps both arms gently around itself in a soft, sheltering hold, posture tender and forgiving.
CAT20-048.sceneLine: A warm pale blue-indigo glow settles softly around the figure like a held breath, gentle and unconditional, suggesting kindness turned inward.

CAT20-049.headline: The Disability Benefits Process
CAT20-049.subtitle: How the system harms mental health
CAT20-049.figureLine: A single standing clay figure stands before an unseen barrier with one hand raised, posture wearied by waiting yet still standing.
CAT20-049.sceneLine: A pale blue-indigo path ahead of the figure folds back on itself in a slow, repeating loop, suggesting a process that wears a person down.

CAT20-052.headline: Peer Support Groups
CAT20-052.subtitle: How shared experience helps in chronic illness
CAT20-052.figureLine: A small cluster of clay figures sits close together, postures leaning gently inward and shoulders nearly touching, conveying understanding shared among equals.
CAT20-052.sceneLine: Soft light blue-indigo threads link each figure to the next in a loose, even web, suggesting strength found in shared experience.

CAT20-058.headline: Parenting With Chronic Illness
CAT20-058.subtitle: Caring for family while living with limits
CAT20-058.figureLine: A single seated clay figure leans gently toward a small clay form beside it with one steadying hand extended, posture loving and present despite its own fatigue.
CAT20-058.sceneLine: A soft light blue-indigo glow connects the figure's hand to the smaller form in a warm, unbroken arc, suggesting devotion sustained through difficulty.

CAT20-062.headline: Spoon Theory
CAT20-062.subtitle: A framework for understanding chronic energy limits
CAT20-062.figureLine: A single seated clay figure carefully holds a small number of identical rounded forms in its open palms, posture mindful and measured, conveying a finite store being budgeted.
CAT20-062.sceneLine: A small set of soft light blue-indigo rounded forms rests in the figure's hands, a few already dimmed, suggesting a limited daily reserve being counted out.

CAT20-065.headline: Medical Decisions When Overwhelmed
CAT20-065.subtitle: Choosing a path while illness floods the mind
CAT20-065.figureLine: A single seated clay figure pauses with one hand pressed to its temple amid scattered surroundings, posture steadying itself to think through a hard choice.
CAT20-065.sceneLine: Several pale blue-indigo paths fan out before the figure, tangled at first then easing apart, suggesting a way forward slowly becoming clearer.
